channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Old damaged cones, 24th March
item.description:
On the A436 between Pegglesworth and the Kilkenny Inn. Despite reporting this twice in the past (still showing on this website), there remains at least 16 old cones on the verges. Why can't these be tidied away?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Fixed road makes new pothole, 24th March
item.description:
The road has fixed two potholes and created an additional pothole that I would have said was one big pothole. The section not filled has a sharp edge that will cause damage to tyres and is a health risk to cyclists that frequently use the lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crippetts Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 24th March
item.description:

item.title: Both signs on the post have been broken off. One should point S into the field, one should point E along the bridleway., 24th March
item.description:
Just outside the entrance to Tredington Park GL20 7DJ.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tredington Park, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole Repairs are sub-standard, 24th March
item.description:
The stretch of road between Blaisdon Way to Pilgrove Way heading to Gloucester was closed 23.3.2026 for repairs. What a shocking standard of works. The road closure gave the impression that whole stretch would be repaired as a complete strip. The potholes in part have been repaired but not packed down to existing road level. Large potholes have not even been touched. We are still having to dodge the potholes, this is dangerous and needs to be addressed as a matter of urgency. What has been done to date is a waste of tax payer money. Please carry out the works to a high standard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metre long gouge in road in centre due to drivers avoiding hole on other side of road, 24th March
item.description:
Central of road on the left side when travelling downhill very dangerous as need to swerve the holes on the other side when coming up the hill
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leckhampton Hill, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 24th March
item.description:
Between 64 and 66 Stanway road. A large tree was cut down several years ago and replaced with a dead stick. The stick was removed after that and several months ago a new tree was put in its place. This has now been removed by the council about a week after being put in. Any idea why?
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 24th March
item.description:
15db Pothole CW 300x300x40mm Road closure with 15db X 1 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Horrendous rd, 24th March
item.description:
Whilst the rd was closed yesterday, clearly only patching has been done, leaving some potholes. The stretch between pilgrove and Cheltenham timber needs a complete resurface
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light sensor is not detecting vehicles problem, 24th March
item.description:
Temp traffic in place with 1 lane closed. When lights are on green only letting through 3 cars at a time, traffic building up. People jumping lights.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Light sensor is not detecting vehicles
